name: operator-smoke
description: Built-in operator plugin for validating Omiga operator discovery, exposure, local/SSH execution, and container execution.

interface.shortDescription: Adds text and container smoke-test operators
interface.longDescription: Provides deterministic built-in operators that write report artifacts without external services. Use them to validate operator registry exposure, single-operator agent calls, and Docker/Singularity execution.
defaultPrompt: Expose the write-text-report operator and run it with message 'hello operator'.
